$comment: Relative Copilot premium-request multipliers per model. An ESTIMATE maintained by this extension (ADR-0003), NOT a live read of the GitHub bill. 0 = included/base model on paid plans; 1 = one premium request; higher = multiplied. Matched by substring against the model family/id, longest match wins. Refreshed 2026-06 from GitHub's published multiplier table; update without an extension release via future table-fetch (PLAN §4).
